query:
UPDATE "ob-poc".access_review_campaigns
                SET confirmed_items = COALESCE(confirmed_items, 0) + $2,
                    reviewed_items = COALESCE(reviewed_items, 0) + $2,
                    pending_items = GREATEST(COALESCE(pending_items, 0) - $2, 0)
                WHERE campaign_id = $1
